items.title: Bitcoin falls under $71K but data shows BTC’s bullish momentum holding
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped below $71,000, but the market’s tilt toward bulls holds as spot ETF inflows and BTC buying from Strategy boost investor sentiment.
items.title_cn: 比特币跌破7.1万美元，但数据显示其看涨势头仍在持续
items.summary_cn: 比特币价格跌破7.1万美元，但由于现货ETF资金流入和Strategy的比特币购买提振了投资者情绪，市场仍偏向看涨。

items.title: Fed holds rates amid higher inflation outlook: Bitcoin bounces to $72K
items.summary: Bitcoin’s pre-FOMC sell-off eased as the US Federal Reserve's choice to leave interest rates unchanged was followed by a swift bounce in BTC price.
items.title_cn: 美联储维持利率不变，通胀预期上升：比特币反弹至7.2万美元
items.summary_cn: 随着美联储决定维持利率不变，比特币在FOMC会议前的抛售压力缓解，价格迅速反弹。

items.title: ‘Rich Dad, Poor Dad’ author says ‘pin is near’ on TradFi ‘bubble burst:’ Predicts $750K Bitcoin
items.summary: Author and personal finance educator Robert Kiyosaki says Bitcoin is going to $750,000, but there's a catch.
items.title_cn: 《富爸爸，穷爸爸》作者称传统金融'泡沫破裂'临近：预测比特币将达75万美元
items.summary_cn: 个人理财教育家罗伯特·清崎表示比特币将涨至75万美元，但存在一个前提条件。

items.title: Bhutan offloads an additional $72.3M Bitcoin amid market downturn
items.summary: After the Kingdom of Bhutan's BTC reserve peaked in October 2024, when it held more than 13,000 coins, it has been pared to just 4,400 Bitcoin.
items.title_cn: 不丹在市场低迷期再抛售7230万美元比特币
items.summary_cn: 不丹王国的比特币储备在2024年10月达到峰值，持有超过1.3万枚比特币，现已减持至仅4400枚。

items.title: Fold Q4 revenue up, CEO sees Bitcoin rewards overtaking air miles
items.summary: Fold CEO Will Reeves said it is focused on scaling its 2026 product line after paying off two convertible debts, removing overhang and enabling it to focus on growth.
items.title_cn: Fold第四季度营收增长，CEO预计比特币奖励将超越航空里程
items.summary_cn: Fold首席执行官Will Reeves表示，在偿还两笔可转换债务后，公司正专注于扩展2026年产品线，消除了负担并专注于增长。

items.title: Crypto Fear and Greed rebounds off extreme lows as traders re-enter
items.summary: The Crypto Fear and Greed Index just ended a 48-day stretch in the “extreme fear” zone, signalling improving sentiment among investors. Will fresh capital inflows reignite the bull market?

items.title: Ethereum aims to cut bridge times by 98% to 13 seconds with new rule
items.summary: Ethereum’s FCR aims to reduce bridge times by up to 98%, bringing L1-to-L2 and exchange deposits down to 13 seconds without a hard fork.

items.title: Bitmine speeds pace of Ethereum buys, boosting treasury to 4.6M ETH
items.summary: About two-thirds of the company’s tokens are currently staked, generating an estimated $180 million in annualized revenue.

items.title: NYSE, Nasdaq, Cboe Align Crypto ETF Options With Liquidity Driven Limits

items.title: Algorand Foundation Cuts 25% of Staff as Crypto Industry Layoffs Grow
items.summary: The organization behind layer-1 blockchain Algorand laid off 25% of its staff due to macroeconomic uncertainty and lower crypto prices.

items.title: Trump White House Registers Aliens.gov—Is the UFO File Drop Imminent?

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: Macro environment remains restrictive with extreme fear (BTC Fear & Greed: 23). DXY strong (100.09) and US10Y high (4.26%) indicate risk-off, though VIX declining (-8.06% 5d) suggests fear subsiding. Fed futures show stable restrictive expectations (3.64% implied rate). Japan's weak yen (159.6) adds intervention risk. News narratives are mixed: Powell focuses on inflation pressure while crypto news highlights regulatory alignment and industry layoffs. Overall, macro headwinds persist but fear may be peaking.

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: Price rank extremely low (10.4/100) with oversold RSI (38.4). Positive funding (0.000015) and OI delta (+4.60%) show some long interest. High long liquidation ($9.48M vs $3.14M short) suggests retail pain, but lower wick exhaustion (8.7%) indicates limited buying pressure. No strong volume signals (0/3 stars). ADX 34.0 shows moderate trend strength. MACD deeply negative (-468) but may be bottoming.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment neutral (-0.0) with concerning token net flow (-4.4M ETH to exchanges = distribution). News mentions bridge improvements but industry layoffs. Technicals: price rank low (23/100), RSI neutral (46.6), ADX strong (36.7). MACD negative (-20.9) but less extreme than BTC. High long liquidation ($10.66M) suggests bottom may be near, but upper wick exhaustion (18.4%) shows selling pressure. No volume signals. 7-day trend (prev closes declining) vs 24H (stable) shows structural weakness.
* **Key Metric**: Negative token net flow (-4.4M ETH) despite neutral sentiment indicates hidden distribution.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: Positive token net flow (+3.2M SOL to exchanges = distribution risk) despite neutral sentiment (-0.0). News identical to general crypto (regulatory/industry). Technicals: price rank very low (20.9/100), RSI oversold (45.6), ADX moderate (30.7). MACD slightly negative (-0.68). Lower wick exhaustion (3.3%) minimal. Long liquidation high ($3.73M) but less extreme than ETH. No volume signals. 7-day trend (declining) vs 24H (flat) shows continued weakness.
* **Key Metric**: Positive token net flow (+3.2M SOL) suggests whales preparing to sell.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境仍然紧缩，市场极度恐惧（BTC恐惧贪婪指数：23）。美元走强（100.09）和美债收益率高企（4.26%）表明风险规避，但VIX下降（5日-8.06%）暗示恐惧情绪正在消退。美联储期货显示稳定的限制性预期（隐含利率3.64%）。日本弱日元（159.6）增加了干预风险。新闻叙事喜忧参半：鲍威尔关注通胀压力，而加密新闻强调监管协调和行业裁员。总体而言，宏观逆风持续，但恐惧可能已见顶。

**🟠 BTC策略（仅合约）**:
* **信号**: 试探
* **现实检查**: 价格排名极低（10.4/100），RSI超卖（38.4）。正资金费率（0.000015）和持仓量变化（+4.60%）显示一定多头兴趣。高多头清算（$948万 vs $314万空头）表明散户痛苦，但下影线耗尽（8.7%）显示买盘压力有限。无强烈成交量信号（0/3星）。ADX 34.0显示中等趋势强度。MACD深度负值（-468）但可能正在筑底。

**🔷 ETH策略**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检查**: 鲸鱼情绪中性（-0.0），但代币净流出令人担忧（-440万ETH至交易所=派发）。新闻提到桥接改进但行业裁员。技术面：价格排名低（23/100），RSI中性（46.6），ADX强劲（36.7）。MACD负值（-20.9）但不如BTC极端。高多头清算（$1066万）暗示底部可能临近，但上影线耗尽（18.4%）显示卖压。无成交量信号。7日趋势（前期收盘价下降）vs 24小时（稳定）显示结构性疲软。
* **关键指标**: 尽管情绪中性，但代币净流出（-440万ETH）表明隐藏派发。

**🟣 SOL策略**:
* **信号**: 等待
* **现实检查**: 代币净流入（+320万SOL至交易所=派发风险）尽管情绪中性（-0.0）。新闻与通用加密新闻相同（监管/行业）。技术面：价格排名极低（20.9/100），RSI超卖（45.6），ADX中等（30.7）。MACD略负（-0.68）。下影线耗尽（3.3%）微弱。多头清算高（$373万）但不如ETH极端。无成交量信号。7日趋势（下降）vs 24小时（持平）显示持续疲软。
* **关键指标**: 代币净流入（+320万SOL）表明鲸鱼准备卖出。
